Source URL: https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Program_Eligibility.asp

# UH APEX Program Eligibility

## Resource type
APEX eligibility and readiness screen.

## Resource summary
Use as a guardrail for government-contracting referrals: physical address in the 28-county service area, legally formed business, for-profit business, active registration where required, eligibility to conduct business in Texas, and clear products/services the company can sell. It notes APEX is not for people merely thinking of starting a business and recommends SBDC for that stage.

## BOSS routing use
Use this when the user's need matches the topic. Ask enough discovery questions to determine readiness before routing to a specialized program.

## Guardrails
Do not guarantee funding, contracts, certifications, export legality, grant awards, loan approval, or technical feasibility. Route to official advisors and professionals.
